# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

apiVersion: envoy.axiomatic.co/v2
kind: EnvoyConfiguration
type: cluster
name: my-edge-proxy

networkFilterConfigs:
  - name: access_log
    typename: file
    config:
      path: /var/log/access.log
      includeAdmin: true
      realServer: true

admin:
  accessLog:
    statPrefix: admin_access_log
  address:
    socketAddress: { address: localhost, portValue: 19000 }

cluster:
  name: my-service
  connectTls: false
  transportSocket:
    commonTransportConfiguration:
      codecType: http1
      statsPrefix: my_service
      accessLog:
        statPrefix: my_service_access_log

routes:
- match:
    prefix: "/stats"
  route:
    cluster: my-service
    route:
      cluster: localhost
      portValue: 8080
      hostIdentifier: { service: stats }
    stripPrefix: true
